basic_details.job_title: Ordnance Factory Hospital Pune Female MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: The Ordnance Factory Hospital Pune has officially announced the Female MBBS Doctor Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on the official Ordnance Factory Hospital Pune website. Candidates who meet the age criteria as specified in the official notification and hold an MBBS degree from an MCI-recognized medical college/university of India along with registration as a Medical Practitioner can attend the walk-in interview on 12 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and attend the walk-in recruitment process are shared below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS degree from MCI recognized medical college/university of India. She should be a Registered Medical Practitioner.
qualification.details: MBBS degree from MCI recognized medical college/university of India. She should be a Registered Medical Practitioner.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the Ordnance Factory Hospital Pune recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Ordnance Factory Hospital Pune recruitment is Female MBBS Doctor. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Female MBBS Doctor post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Female MBBS Doctor post in Ordnance Factory Hospital Pune.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility criteria for the Female MBBS Doctor position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from an MCI recognized medical college/university in India and be a Registered Medical Practitioner.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Female MBBS Doctor role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 75,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q6. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 12 June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies, and recent passport-size photographs. Specific documents like ID proof, educational certificates, and registration certificates are usually required.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Female MBBS Doctor post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is Ordnance Factory Hospital Pune located?
faq.answer: Ordnance Factory Hospital Pune is located in Pune, Maharashtra, with the pincode 412101.
